work_completed: Diagnosed that the published @neurolift-technologies/toi@1.0.0 tarball contains no dist/ (only LICENSE/README/SPEC/package.json/schema), so its main/types/exports point at nonexistent files and the package is non-functional on install
Confirmed the same defect in @neurolift-technologies/otoi@1.0.0 (npm pack shows only package.json), and that otoi imports toi values at runtime — so toi must ship dist before otoi can build/publish
Bumped packages/toi/package.json to 1.0.1 and recorded the packaging fix under CHANGELOG [Unreleased] > Fixed
Verified locally: tsc build produces dist/index.js + dist/index.d.ts; vitest 65/65 pass; `npm publish --dry-run` confirms dist/ is included in the 1.0.1 tarball via the prepack build
work_in_progress: npm publish of toi@1.0.1 is BLOCKED on maintainer 2FA (npm EOTP). Registry still shows 1.0.0.
After toi@1.0.1 is live: build + publish @neurolift-technologies/otoi@1.1.0 (already merged to nlt-otoi main via PR #40, Apache-2.0)
blockers: npm publish requires a one-time password (2FA) held by the maintainer (npm user: neurolift-tech). Claude cannot complete the publish.
decisions_made: Patch bump (1.0.1) — packaging fix only, no API change

Recorded the fix under CHANGELOG [Unreleased] > Fixed rather than a [1.0.1] section, because this repo's CHANGELOG version line (0.8.0/Unreleased) tracks the framework, separate from the npm package version line
decisions_pending: Maintainer to run the OTP-gated publishes for toi@1.0.1 and otoi@1.1.0
escalations: Escalated the broken-dist discovery to Joshua, who chose 'fix & publish both'; publish now awaits his 2FA OTP
handoff_record.next_agent_notes: Publish steps (maintainer, with 2FA): (1) cd nlt-toi/packages/toi && npm publish --access public --otp=<code>; verify `npm view @neurolift-technologies/toi version` -> 1.0.1. (2) In nlt-otoi (main, otoi@1.1.0): cd packages/otoi && rm -rf node_modules && npm install && npm run build && npm publish --access public --otp=<code>; verify `npm view @neurolift-technologies/otoi version license` -> 1.1.0 / Apache-2.0. Optionally `npm deprecate` the broken 1.0.0 versions of both packages. Consider an npm automation token to avoid OTP friction on future publishes.
tests_run: npm run build (tsc) in packages/toi — dist/index.js + dist/index.d.ts produced
npm publish --dry-run --access public — tarball includes full dist/ (45 files, 35.1 kB)
